title: New SEC Chair, Bitcoin, xAI Supercomputer, UnitedHealth CEO murder, with Gavin Baker & Joe Lonsdale
description:
(0:00) Bestie announcement!

(2:53) Gavin Baker and Joe Lonsdale join the show

(4:14) State of the Trump Bump: Debt focus, Deregulation, America's lucky position

(20:08) Trump nominates Paul Atkins as SEC Chair, replacing Gary Gensler: What this means for crypto and other markets

(41:07) Thoughts on Michael Saylor's Bitcoin play, state of defense tech, and the US/China AI competition

(49:25) xAI's massive GPU cluster, expanding to 1M GPUs, how Grok 3 will test AI scaling laws, and what's next

(1:08:28) UnitedHealth CEO murdered, reactions

analysis.summary: The All-In Podcast discusses the new SEC Chair, Bitcoin, xAI Supercomputer, and the UnitedHealth CEO murder with guests Gavin Baker and Joe Lonsdale. They cover various topics including the Trump Bump, debt focus, deregulation, and the US/China AI competition. The hosts also share their thoughts on Michael Saylor's Bitcoin play and the state of defense tech.

takeaways.text: Trump nominates Paul Atkins as SEC Chair
xAI's massive GPU cluster to expand to 1M GPUs
Grok 3 to test AI scaling laws
Trump Bump: debt focus and deregulation
America's lucky position in global economy

sentiment.notes: The hosts discuss a range of topics with varying levels of optimism and concern, resulting in a mixed sentiment.

notable_moments.description: Trump nominates Paul Atkins as SEC Chair
